mentions.note: High school caller asks about entry amid U.S. conflict uncertainty. Cramer advises dollar-cost averaging: buy 2 shares now, then 3 more if it drops below $500 (stock hit ~$700 recently). Avoid chasing; be disciplined.
Best-in-group defense contractor if forced to own one; government spending on defense likely to persist despite cycle concerns; prefers LMT over newer/cheaper drone plays.
